signal_status.headline: Iran war enters day 32 with Trump claiming ceasefire progress and Iran allowing 20 oil ships through Strait of Hormuz
signal_status.summary: As of March 31, 2026, the US-Israel military operation against Iran continues with ongoing airstrikes on Tehran and Isfahan. Trump announced Iran agreed to allow 20 oil ships through the Strait of Hormuz and claims the US campaign is winding down with goals of degrading Iran's nuclear program achieved. However, Iran previously rejected a 15-point US ceasefire proposal and issued its own counterproposal demanding war reparations and sovereignty over the Strait. A Kuwaiti oil tanker was struck off Dubai, indicating continued maritime threats despite diplomatic claims of progress.
sources: CNN - Day 32 of Middle East conflict
NYT - Trump Says Iran Agreed to Allow 20 More Ships Through Strait
Al Jazeera - Iran war day 32 updates
Fox News - Iran greenlights 20 oil ships through Strait
NPR - Iran rejects Trump's proposal, lays out 5 conditions
signal_status.signal: Iran war and Strait of Hormuz
signal_status.original_signal: Iran war and Strait of Hormuz

signal_status.headline: Board of Peace presents 8-month Hamas disarmament plan at UN, $7B reconstruction fund announced, ISF deployment authorized under Resolution 2803
signal_status.summary: Trump's Board of Peace has moved from formation to operational phase with concrete disarmament timeline requiring Hamas to allow destruction of Gaza tunnel network over 8 months, linked to reconstruction funding. $7 billion in international commitments secured for Gaza reconstruction fund. UN Resolution 2803 has authorized deployment of International Stabilization Force to Gaza Strip, with Kosovo announcing troop contributions. Disarmament compliance directly tied to reconstruction access, creating leverage mechanism over Hamas.
sources: Reuters - Trump announces $7B Gaza reconstruction fund at Board of Peace debut
Wikipedia - Resolution 2803 authorizes ISF deployment to Gaza Strip
Reuters - Hamas disarmament plan requires tunnel destruction over 8 months
Al Jazeera - Board of Peace presents Gaza disarmament plan at UN
Pravda NATO - Kosovo approves sending troops to Gaza stabilization force
signal_status.signal: Board of Peace and Gaza reconstruction
signal_status.original_signal: Board of Peace and Gaza reconstruction
